buttons.rebuildProfile: Jambulani mbiri yanu kuchokera ku CV yanu

validation.passwordMinLength: Mawu achinsinsi ayenera kukhala osachepera zilembo 8.
validation.passwordNeedLowercase: Mawu achinsinsi ayenera kukhala ndi chilembo chimodzi chaching'ono.
validation.passwordNeedUppercase: Mawu achinsinsi ayenera kukhala ndi chilembo chimodzi chachikulu.
validation.passwordNeedNumber: Mawu achinsinsi ayenera kukhala ndi nambala imodzi.
validation.passwordNeedSpecialChar: Mawu achinsinsi ayenera kukhala ndi chilembo chapadera chimodzi monga: !@#$%*& nk.

errors.maxFileSize: Fayilo yosankhidwa ndi yayikulu kwambiri. Kukula kwapamwamba ndi 3 MB.
errors.tooDense: CV yanu ili ndi malembo ochulukapo kuposa momwe tingakonzere. Chonde chepetsani mawu kapena ikani fayilo yokhala ndi masamba ochepako, ndiyeno yesaninso.
errors.emptyParse: Sitinathe kuona chitukuko mu CV yanu. Chonde onani fayilo ndipo yesani kenako.
errors.generic: Kugwiritsa ntchito CV yanu kunalephera. Chonde yesani kenako kapena gwiritsani ntchito fayilo ina.
errors.rateLimit: Kukena kwambiri pamodzi. Chonde dikirani phindi imodzi ndipo yesani kenako.
errors.maxUploadsReached: Mwafika chiwerengero chapamwamba cha kukena CV pa nkhaniyi. Kukena kwina sikuloledwa.
errors.duplicate: CV iyi yidakenedwa kale. Sankhani kuchokera ku CV zanu zidakenedwa kale.
errors.unsupportedFileType: Mtundu wa fayilo sazigwiritsidwa. Zololedwa: PDF, DOCX, TXT.
errors.timeout: Kukena kwatenga nthawi yayitali kwambiri. Nthawi zambiri izi zimachitika chifukwa cha kulumikizidwa kosakhazikika — chonde onaninso intaneti yanu ndi kuyesanso.
errors.cvMarkdownTooLong: Zomwe zili mu CV yanu ndi zatali kwambiri. Chonde fupitsani CV yanu ndipo yesani kenako.

errors.updateState: Kusintha kalembedwe ka nzeru kunalephera. Chonde yesani kenako.
errors.generic: Chinthu chinachitika cholakwika. Chonde yesani kenako.

api.requestTooLong: Zomwe zatumizidwa kwa ntchito zikuoneka kuti ndi zayikulu. Chonde yesani ndi zochepera. Ngati vuto likupitirira, chotsani cache ya browser yanu ndipo tsitsani tsamba.
api.tooManyRequests: Zikuoneka kuti mukupempha zambiri. Chonde chepetsani ndipo yesani kenako.
api.unexpectedError: Chinthu chinalephera kumbali yathu. Chonde yesaninso pang'ono, ndipo ngati chipitirira kuchitika, koperani chizindikiro chili pansipa ndikuchitumiza ku thandizo.
api.serverConnectionError: Sitingathe kulumikiza ku ntchito. Chonde onani intaneti yanu kapena yesani kenako.
api.resourceNotFound: Zomwe mwapempha sizinapezeke. Chonde chotsani cache ya browser yanu ndipo tsitsani tsamba.
api.authenticationFailure: Zikuoneka kuti simunalowe. Chonde lowani kuti mupitilize.
api.permissionDenied: Zikuoneka kuti mulibe chilolezo chofunika. Chonde tsekani ndipo lowani kenako.
api.unableToProcessResponse: Tidaonana ndi vuto pamene tikugwiritsa ntchito data. Chotsani cache ya browser ndipo tsitsani kapena yesani kenako.
api.serviceUnavailable: Ntchitoyo palibe pano. Chonde yesani kenako.
api.dataValidationError: Zikuoneka kuti pali vuto ndi pempho lanu. Ngati mukumtumiza data, onetsetsani kuti ndi yovomerezeka ndipo yesani kenako. Ngati vuto likupitirira, chotsani cache ndipo tsitsani tsamba.
api.unableToProcessRequest: Pepani. Chinthu chinachitika cholakwika pamene tikugwiritsa ntchito pempho lanu.

chatHeader.feedbackMessage: Tikufuna kumva nkhani yanu pa chitukuko chanu mpaka pano!
chatHeader.feedbackMessagePlaceholder: Tikufuna kumva maganizo anu! Chonde gawani nkhani kapena malangizo omwe muli nawo okonza {{appName}}.
chatHeader.anonymousAccountWarning: Pano mukugwiritsa ntchito akaunti yosadziwika. Mutuluka, mudzachita chilakwira mbiri ya nkhani ndi zochitika zanu.
chatHeader.logoutWarningAnonymous: Mutuluka, mudzachita chilakwira mbiri ya nkhani ndi zochitika zanu.
chatHeader.createAccountToSaveProgress: Lembetsani akaunti kuti musunge mapeto anu

cvUploadPolling.failedToStart: Sitinathe kuyambitsa kukena kwanu. Chonde yesaninso.
cvUploadPolling.networkErrorStatus: Tatayika kulumikizana pamene tinkaonera kukena kwanu. Kukena kukhoza kupitilira kuchita bwino — tiyesanso.
cvUploadPolling.thinkingMessage: Kugwiritsa ntchito CV yanu, izi zingachitire nthawi...

chatMessageField.uploadCvIntro: Mungakene CV yanu pomwe tikuyamba kufufuza zochitika zanu
chatMessageField.uploadCvCollectExperiences: PDF, DOCX, TXT • Pamwamba {{MAX_FILE_SIZE_MB}} MB • zilembo {{MAX_MARKDOWN_CHARS}} pamwamba
chatMessageField.uploadCvOtherPhase: Kukena CV kulipo pokha pamene tikukusanyira zochitika

placeholders.offline: Simuli pa intaneti. Chonde lumikizani pa intaneti kuti mutume uthenga.

conversationConclusionFooter.viewAndDownloadCv: Onani ndi kutsitsa lipoti lanu la maluso
conversationConclusionFooter.createAccountIntro: Ngati mukufuna kufufuza nzeru ndi zochitika zanu mtsogolo, mungathe
conversationConclusionFooter.verificationReminder: Imelo yotsimikiza yatumizidwa kwa imelo yanu. Chonde tsimikizani akaunti yanu musanalowe kenako.
conversationConclusionFooter.feedbackFromYouSuffix: zambiri kuchokera kwa inu. Zingachitire madengu 5 okha ndipo zithandiza ife kukonza!

startNewConversationDialog.title: Yambani Nkhani Yatsopano?
startNewConversationDialog.content: Muyamba nkhani yatsopano, uthenga wonse wa nkhani yano udzachitika chilakwira nthawi zonse.
startNewConversationDialog.confirmation: Mukutsimikiza kuti mukufuna kuyamba nkhani yatsopano?

refreshConfirmationDialog.title: Mukutsimikiza kuti mukufuna kutsitsa tsamba?
refreshConfirmationDialog.content: {{appName}} ikulemba ndipo kutsitsa tsamba kungabweretse mavuto. Mungachita chilakwira mapeto a nkhani yano.
refreshConfirmationDialog.question: Mukufuna kudikira {{appName}} imalize, kapena tsitsani kenako?

util.feedbackThankYou: Zikomo chifukwa cha nthawi yopereka nkhani yanu yofunika.
util.errorSomethingWentWrong: Pepani, zikuoneka kuti chinthu chinachitika cholakwika kwa ine... Chonde tsitsani tsamba ndipo yesani kenako?
util.errorPleaseRepeat: Pepani, zikuoneka kuti chinthu chinachitika cholakwika kwa ine... Chonde buuzani kenako?

dislikeReasonPopover.title: Chonde tiuzeni kuti vuto ndi chiyani?

errors.submitLike: Chisonyezero chanu sichinatumizidwe. Dinani kachiwiri kuti muyesenso.
errors.removeLike: Sitinathe kuchotsa chisonyezero chanu. Dinani kachiwiri kuti muyesenso.
errors.submitDislike: Chisonyezero chanu sichinatumizidwe. Dinani kachiwiri kuti muyesenso.
errors.removeDislike: Sitinathe kuchotsa chisonyezero chanu. Dinani kachiwiri kuti muyesenso.

login.loginToYourAccountToContinue: Lowani ku akaunti yanu kuti mupitilize
login.fillInEmailAndPassword: Chonde lembani imelo ndi mawu achinsinsi
login.orLoginToYourAccountToContinue: Kapena lowani ku akaunti yanu kuti mupitilize

appHero.subheadline: Njira yanu yomwe ikutsogoleredwa kuchokera ku nzeru mpaka ku ntchito yoyamba — yomangidwa pa zimene mumazidziwa, zimene mwachita, ndi komwe mukufuna kupita.
appHero.feature1Body: Dziwani nzeru zimene muli nazo kale — kuchokera ku maphunziro anu, ntchito yanu, ndi moyo wanu.
appHero.feature2Body: Pangani CV yaukadaulo yomwe imagwirizana ndi zomwe ogwira ntchito ku Zambia akufuna.
appHero.feature3Body: Yang'anani ntchito zofunika, mutsekese zofunikira, ndipo linganizani ndi mwayi woona wa ntchito.

landing.subtitleBody: Fufuzani ndipo tchulani nzeru zanu kudzera m'nkhani zongozedwa ndi AI. Mangani mbiri yanu ya nzeru ndipo tsitsani CV kuti muyambe kufufuza ntchito. Lembetsani akaunti yaulere kuti musunge mapeto ndipo mubwerere ku mbiri ya nkhani yanu.

verifyEmail.verificationEmailSentMessage: Imelo yotsimikiza yatumizidwa kwa imelo yanu. Kuti mupitilize, chonde tsimikizani imelo yanu koyamba.

authHandler.passwordRequirementsNotMet: Onetsetsani kuti pasiwedi yanu ikukwaniritsa zofunikira zonse.
authHandler.verifyEmailSuccessRedirect: Imelo yanu yatsimikizidwa. Mutumizidwa ku tsamba lolowera mu nthawi yochepa.
authHandler.passwordResetSuccessFull: Pasiwedi yanu yasinthidwa bwino. Tsopano mutha kulowa ndi pasiwedi yanu yatsopano.
authHandler.recoverEmailSuccessWithEmail: Adilesi ya imelo yanu yabwezeretsedwa ku {{email}}. Tatumizanso ulalo wokhazikitsanso pasiwedi ku adilesi imeneyo ngati chenjezo.

errors.title: Pena pena pakhala vuto
errors.invalidLink: Ulalo uwu ulibe zofunikira. Ungakhale wopenda kapena wosakwana.
errors.linkInvalidOrExpired: Ulalo uwu si wovomerezeka kapena watha. Chonde pemphani watsopano.
errors.unknownMode: Sitinathe kuzindikira chochita chomwe ulalo uwu wapempha.

anonymousAccountConversionDialog.registrationInfo: Chonde lembetsani ndi imelo kuti mukhalenso ndi kupeza nkhaniyi. Popanda kulembetsa, simudzatha kulowa kenako kapena kubwerera ku nkhaniyi.
anonymousAccountConversionDialog.emailWarning: Chonde onetsetsani kuti mukugwiritsa ntchito imelo yovomerezeka, chifukwa sizingasinthidwe kenako ndipo mudzapemphedwa kuitsimikiza.
anonymousAccountConversionDialog.emailsMismatch: Chonde onetsetsani kuti imelo zonse ziwiri zikugwirizana
anonymousAccountConversionDialog.passwordRequirementsNotMet: Chonde onetsetsani kuti mawu achinsinsi anu akukwaniritsa zofunika zonse
anonymousAccountConversionDialog.verificationSentWithEmail: Pano mwalowa ndi imelo: {{email}}. Imelo yotsimikiza yatumizidwa kwa imelo yanu. Chonde tsimikizani akaunti yanu musanalowe kenako.

passwordReset.failedToSendResetEmail: Sitinathe kutumiza imelo yosinthira mawu achinsinsi pakadali pano. Chonde yesaninso.
passwordReset.passwordResetLinkSent: Chingwe chosinthira mawu achinsinsi chatumizidwa kwa imelo yanu.

requestInvitationCodeFormModal.requestAccessSubtitle: Chonde tiuzeni momwe mupangira kugwiritsa ntchito {{appName}}. Tidzayang'anira pempho lanu ndipo tidzalumikizana posachedwapa.
requestInvitationCodeFormModal.name: Dzina
requestInvitationCodeFormModal.messagePlaceholder: Chonde gawani momwe mupangira kugwiritsa ntchito {{appName}}
requestInvitationCodeFormModal.invitationRequestSubmitSuccess: Pempho lanu la kupeza {{appName}} latumizidwa bwino. Tidzabwerera posachedwapa.
requestInvitationCodeFormModal.invitationRequestSubmitError: Chinthu chinachitika cholakwika pamene tinayesa kutuma pempho lanu

resendVerificationEmail.emailNotVerified: Imelo yanu sinatsimikizidwe. Chonde onani bokosi lanu la imelo la imelo yotsimikiza.

socialAuth.googleLoginIsNotAvailableWhenOffline: Kulowa ndi Google sikulipo pamene simuli pa intaneti.
socialAuth.accountNotRegistered: Akauntiyi sinilembetsedwe. Chonde lumikizanani ndi omwe adapatsa chingwechi.

errors.loginFailedGeneric: Sitinathe kukulowetsani pakadali pano. Chonde yesaninso.
errors.registerFailedGeneric: Sitinathe kumaliza kulembetsa kwanu pakadali pano. Chonde yesaninso.
errors.preferencesFetchFailedWithMessage: Cholakwika chachitika pamene tinayesa kutenga zokonda zanu: {{message}}

firebase.emailAlreadyInUse: Akaunti yokhala ndi imelo iyi ilipo kale. Ngati munalembetsa ndi Google, chonde gwiritsani ntchito batani la 'Lowani ndi Google' kulowa.
firebase.emailNotVerified: Imelo yomwe mukugwiritsa ntchito yalembetsedwa, koma simunatsimikiza. Chonde tsimikizani imelo yanu kuti mupitilize.
firebase.invalidCredential: Imelo/mawu achinsinsi omwe mwatumiza ndi ovutika.
firebase.userNotFound: Palibe wogwiritsa anapezeka pa zobisika zomwe mwatumiza.
firebase.tooManyRequests: Tatseka mapempho onse kuchokera pa chipangizochi chifukwa cha zochita zosachilengedwe. Yesani kenako.
firebase.tooManyUsers: Pali ogwiritsa ambiri kwambiri pa pulojekiti ya Firebase.
firebase.invalidRegistrationCode: Code yolembetsa yomwe mwalemba ndi yovutika. Chonde onani code ndipo yesani kenako.
firebase.invalidInvitationCode: Code yokondera yomwe mwalemba ndi yovutika. Chonde onani code ndipo yesani kenako.
firebase.invalidInvitationType: Code yomwe mwagwiritsa ntchito ndi yolembetsa osati yokulowerani. Chonde pitani ku tsamba lolembetsa.
firebase.invalidRegistrationType: Code yomwe mwagwiritsa ntchito ndi yokulowerani osati yolembetsa. Chonde pitani ku tsamba lokulowerani.
firebase.popupClosedByUser: Popup ya Google yatsekedwa musanathe kulowa.
firebase.invalidLoginMethod: Ntchitoyi siloledwa ndi njira yano yokulowerani.

cvTypingChatMessage.uploading: Chonde dikirani pamene ndikukena ndi kugwiritsa ntchito CV yanu
cvTypingChatMessage.uploadedReady: Zomwe zili mu CV yanu zili m'munda wa mawu. Yang'anani ndipo tumizani mukonzekera.

uploadedCVsMenu.helpCollect: Dinani CV kuti mutulutse zomwe zili m'munda wa mawu. Yang'anani ndipo tumizani mukonzekera.
uploadedCVsMenu.helpDisabled: Kusankha CV kulipo pokha pamene tikukusanyira zochitika.

summaryEditField.restoreFailed: Sitinathe kubwezera chidulecho. Chidule chanu chakale chilipo — chonde yesaninso.

experienceEditForm.updateFailed: Zosintha zanu sizinasungidwe. Chonde yesaninso pang'ono.
experienceEditForm.infoHelp: Dinani munda kuti musinthe mtundu wa ntchito, mutu, tsiku, kampani, malo, kapena fupikizo la chitukuko chanu.
experienceEditForm.topSkillsHelpEdit: Dinani nzeru kuti muone zambiri. Gwiritsani ntchito dropdown kusintha chilembo cha nzeru ndi chizindikiro chofuta kuchichotsa. Dinani batani la Onjezani Nzeru kuti muonjezere.

experiencesDrawerContent.actionsUnavailableUntilExplored: Zochitazi zidzapezeka pomwe mwakambirana chitukuko ndi {{appName}} mwatsatanetsatane.

restoreExperiencesDrawer.title: Bwezeretsani Zochitika Zachotsedwa
restoreExperiencesDrawer.fetchFailed: Sitinathe kutenga zochitika zomwe munachotsa pakali pano. Zilipo bwino — chonde yesaninso.

downloadReportButton.helpTipBlockedMessage: Simungathe kutsitsa report mpaka mwatha kufufuza chitukuko chimodzi.

shareReportButton.shareFailed: Sitinathe kugawana lipoti lanu. Mukhoza kuitsitsa ndi kugawana fayilo mwachindunji.
shareReportButton.shareCanceled: Kugawa kwaletetsedwa chifukwa cha pempho la wogwiritsa ntchito

experiencesDrawer.personalInfoTooltip: Zobisikazi zimachokera ku profile yanu ndipo zimaphatikizidwa mu CV yanu. Kuti muzisinthe kapena muzichotsere, sinthani fayilo yotsitsidwa.
experiencesDrawer.uncategorizedTooltip: Pamalingaliro a nkhani, zochitikazi sizinathe kugawidwa yekha.

unsavedChanges.title: Zosungidwa Zosinasungidwe
unsavedChanges.content: Muli ndi zosintha zosinasungidwe. Mukutsimikiza kuti mukufuna kutseka popanda kusunga?

delete.title: Chotsani Chitukuko
delete.content: Mukutsimikiza kuti mukufuna kuchotsa chitukukochi? Chochitachi sichingabweretsedwe.

revert.title: Bwezerani Chitukuko
revert.content: Mukutsimikiza kuti mukufuna kubwezeretsa chitukukochi ku mtundu wosinasinthidwe? Izizi zidzachita chilakwira zosintha zilizonse zomwe mwachita.

experiencesDrawer.emptyStateMessage: Tinabe kufufuza zochitika mpaka pano. Tiyeni tipitilize kukambirana.

workTypeDescription.selfEmployment: Mukugwira ntchito nokha, mukuyendetsa bizinesi yanu, kapena mukutenga ntchito za freelance kapena kontrakiti
workTypeDescription.formalSectorWagedEmployment: Muli ndi ntchito yolipidwa ndipo mukugwira ntchito kwa wogwiritsa, kampani, kapena bungwe
workTypeDescription.formalSectorUnpaidTraineeWork: Muli mu udindo wa maphunziro kapena internship kuti mupeze nzeru kapena chitukuko
workTypeDescription.unseenUnpaid: Mukugwira ntchito yosolipidwa monga kusamalira, ntchito za nyumba, kapena kudyerera m'dera

report.skillsDescriptionText: Pansipa, mupeza mndandanda wa nzeru zinapezeka pamene mukukambirana ndi {{appName}}, limodzi ndi kufotokozera kwake.

disclaimer.part2: Nzeru zolembedwa zimakhudza nkhani ndi wogwiritsa, sizitsimikizidwa ndi Tabiya, ndipo zingakhale zolakwika.
disclaimer.part3: Zobisika ziyenera kuyang'aniridwa musanagwiritsidwe ntchito kufufuza ntchito, mafunso a ntchito, kapena kupanga CV. Kusintha zobisikazi, kambiranani ndi {{appName}} kenako kapena pangani CV yathunthu kutengera report iyi.

report.bodyText: Report iyi imafupikiza zobisika zofunika zomwe zinasonkhanitsidwa pamene mukukambirana ndi {{appName}} pa {{date}}. {{appName}} ndi chatbot ya AI yomwe imathandiza oyenera ntchito kufufuza nzeru ndi zochitika zawo. Report iyi imaonetsa chitukuko cha ntchito cha wogwiritsa ndi nzeru zinapezeka kuchokera pa chitukuko chilichonse. Zobisikazi zingagwiritsidwe ntchito kutsogolera kufufuza ntchito ndi kuonetsa nzeru zawo pamene akupempha ntchito, makamaka pamene akukambirana ndi ogwiritsa angapo. Zingakhale yoyamba yabwino yopanga CV yathunthu.

skillsRankingPrompt.mainMessage: Posachedwapa! Yankhani mafunso angapo ena a fufuzo ndipo tidzakutumizirani <0>{{compensationAmount}}</0> airtime mukamaliza ntchito zonse.

skillsRankingBriefing.introWorkBased: Ngati mukufuna, ndingawerengere gawo liti la mwayi a <0>{{jobPlatformUrl}}</0> omwe agwirizana ndi nzeru zanu ndi momwe mukugwirizanira ndi oyenera ena — mukufunira kundionetsa kuti zobisikazi ndi zofunika bwanji kwa inu.
skillsRankingBriefing.introTimeBased: Ngati mukufuna, ndingawerengere gawo liti la mwayi a <0>{{jobPlatformUrl}}</0> omwe agwirizana ndi nzeru zanu ndi momwe mukugwirizanira ndi oyenera ena. Izizi zingachitire nthawi — ngati simukufuna kudikira, mungadinani <0>lambani</0> nthawi iliyonse m'uthenga wotsatira, pamene ndikugwerera. Mukonzekera chonde dinani <1>pitilizani</1>.
skillsRankingBriefing.puzzleInstructions: Muona zilembo zopindika pa skrini zingapo. Pindani chilembo chilichonse cholondola pogwiritsa ntchito mabatani ophindika. Mungalambire nthawi iliyonse. Mwa 5% ya zochitika, <0>zilembo zambiri zokonzedwa = mwayi wapamwamba wopeza zobisikazi.</0> Nthawi ina zimadalira ine.

skillsRankingProofOfValue.waitingMessage: Chonde dikirani pamene ndikugwerera ma calculation, kapena dinani lambani nthawi iliyonse ngati simukufuna kudikira zobisikazi.

skillsRankingCompletionAdvice.adviceMessage: Malangizo: Manambala awa ndi anu. Manambala awa angasinthe bwanji momwe mukufufuzira ntchito mu sabata ino? Imani ndipo ganizirani kuti nthawi ndi mphamvu zanu pano zikugwira bwanji mu ndondomeko yanu yopeza ntchito.

skillsRankingRetypedRank.question_1: Monga funso lomaliza, tikumbukire zomwe ndinakuuzani pamwambapa okhudza kugwirizana kwanu ndi mwayi:
skillsRankingRetypedRank.question_2: onani kenako zomwe ndinati uthenga utatu wapitawa, asilimia angati ya mwayi
skillsRankingRetypedRank.sliderAria: Slider ya asilimia ya rank yolembedwa kenako

skillsRankingPerceivedRank.questionWithDisclosure: Tsopano, ganizirani ogwiritsa 100 awa a <0>{{jobPlatformUrl}}</0>, omwe ambiri ndi oyenera ntchito kuchokera ku South Africa zaka 18-34 ndi matric kuchokera ku sukulu ya tauni kapena kumudzi. <0>Ndi angati mwa 100 amenewa</0> mukumvera kuti angagwirizane ndi <0>mwayi ochepera</0> pa <0>{{jobPlatformUrl}}</0> <0>kuposa inu</0>?
skillsRankingPerceivedRank.questionWithoutDisclosure: Musanathe nkhani yathu, ndili ndi funso limodzi lomaliza lokhudza zomwe tatchula pamwambapa — ngati munganizire anthu 100 omwe ndi oyenera ntchito kuchokera ku South Africa zaka 18-34 ndi matric kuchokera ku sukulu ya tauni kapena kumudzi. Ndi angati mwa oyenera ntchito 100 amenewa mukumvera kuti angagwirizane ndi <0>udindo ochepera</0> pa <1>{{jobPlatformUrl}}</1> kuposa inu?
skillsRankingPerceivedRank.sliderAria: Slider ya asilimia ya rank yomwe mukuganizira

skillsRankingJobSeekerDisclosure.pendingMessage: Zikomo! Tikungodziwanso mwayi apano a {{jobPlatformUrl}} kuti manambala akhale olondola. Tidzagawana zotsatira zanu posachedwapa kapena mungapemphe pamene tidzakuitanira pa foni.
skillsRankingJobSeekerDisclosure.updateError: Kusintha kalembedwe ka nzeru kunalephera. Chonde yesani kenako.

rotateToSolve.instructions1: Pindani chilembo chilichonse mpaka chikhale cholondola. Sankhani chilembo pogwiritsa ntchito dinani, kenako pindani clockwise ndi
rotateToSolve.puzzleCompleteMessage: Puzzle yatha! Chonde yesaninso kapena lambani ngati simukufuna kwambiri zobisikazi.

consentPage.introPart1: Tinapanga chida ichi cha AI kwa inu mwatsatane kuti tithandize inu ndi anyamata ena monga inu kufufuza nzeru zawo ndi kupeza mwayi watsopano.
consentPage.introPart2: Tekinolojia ya AI ndi yatsopano ndipo yayikulu kufika pachilengedwe. Sikumvetsa m'mtundu monga anthu.
consentPage.introPart3: Nthawi zonse yang'anirani zofunika ndipo pepani kugawana zobisika za inu ndi ena ndi AI pamene mukukambirana.
consentPage.introPart4: Tithandizeni kusunga zonse za AI ndi zabwino!

sensitiveDataForm.title: Perekani Zobisika Zanu
sensitiveDataForm.subtitle: Tikugwiritsa ntchito data yanu kupangira chitukuko chanu ndipo tingalumikizane ndi inu za {{appName}}.
sensitiveDataForm.unskippableSubtitle: Chonde perekani zobisika zotsatirazi kuti mupitilize.
sensitiveDataForm.helpTipText: Zobisika zanu zasungidwa ndi encryption yapamwamba ndipo zasungidwa bwino.
sensitiveDataForm.failedToLoadProgrammes: Sitinathe kutenga mapulogalamu a sukuluyi pakadali pano. Chonde yesaninso kusankha sukulu.
sensitiveDataForm.invalidForm: Chonde konzani magawo omwe adawonetsedwa musanatume.
sensitiveDataForm.savedSuccess: Data ya munthu yasungidwa bwino ndi mwamphamvu.
sensitiveDataForm.errorDefault: Data ya munthu sinathe kusungidwa. Chonde yesani kenako ndipo ngati vuto likupitirira, chotsani cache ya browser ndipo tsitsani tsamba.
sensitiveDataForm.errorEncryptedDataTooLarge: Data ya munthu zikuoneka kuti ndi yayikulu kusungidwa. Chonde yesani ndi mtengo waching'ono m'minda. Ngati vuto likupitirira, chotsani cache ndipo tsitsani tsamba.
sensitiveDataForm.rejectParagraph1: Tikuombola kuti mwasankha kusapereka data yanu. Kupereka zobisikazi kumathandiza {{appName}} kupereka chitukuko chanu. Simudzatha kupitilize ndipo mudzatulutsidwa.
sensitiveDataForm.skipParagraph1: Tikuombola kuti mwakonda kusapereka data yanu. Kupereka zobisikazi kumathandiza {{appName}} kupereka chitukuko chanu. Chonde dziwani kuti ngati mwasiya gawo ili,

customerSatisfactionRating.questionText: Pomaliza, tikufuna kumva maganizo anu pa chitukuko chanu mpaka pano! Mukondwa bwanji ndi {{appName}}?
customerSatisfactionRating.submitError: Chiwongolero chanu sichinatumizidwe. Chonde yesaninso pang'ono.

feedbackForm.submitError: Ndemanga yanu sinatumizidwe. Chonde yesaninso pang'ono. Ngati izi zikupitirira, gwiritsani ntchito chizindikiro chomwe chimawonekera pamene zinthu zikulephera ndi kudziwitsa thandizo.

feedbackModal.title: Lengezani cholakwika kapena tumizani ndemanga
feedbackModal.subtitle: Tiuzeni zomwe zinachitika kapena zomwe zingathandize. Timawerenga zonse.
feedbackModal.messagePlaceholder: Fotokozani zomwe zinachitika, zomwe munkayembekezera, kapena ndemanga iliyonse...

errorPage.defaultMessage: Chinthu chinachitika cholakwika ndi {{appName}}. Yesani kutsitsa tsamba, ndipo ngati chikupitirira kuchitika, koperani chizindikiro chili pansipa ndikuchitumiza ku thandizo.

restAPIError.storyChooseMessageLabel: Sankhani uthenga wa cholakwika woonesedwa m'chidziwitso:

supportReference.heading: Ngati izi zikupitirira, koperani zambiri zili pansipa ndi kuzigawana ndi thandizo:

careerExplorer.title: Kafukufuku wa Ntchito
careerExplorer.subtitle: Onani ntchito zomwe zikugwirizana ndi maluso anu — malipiro, ziyeneretso, ndi olemba ntchito akuluakulu.

careerReadiness.emptyList: Palibe ma module omwe alipo pano.
careerReadiness.introduction: Gwirani ntchito module iliyonse mokwanira. Iliyonse ndi mabwenzi otsogoleredwa ndi AI omwe amasokoneza gawo lina la luso. Pitirizani kuchokera kumalo omwe mwanaika kapena yambani module yatsopano.
careerReadiness.pageDescription: Pangani luso omwe olemba ntchito akufuna kuposa maphunziro anu aukadaulo
careerReadiness.listError: Sitingathe kutsitsa ma module. Chonde yesani kachiwiri.
careerReadiness.progressDescription: Maphunziro a kukonzekera ntchito amene mwathera
careerReadiness.quizPassedAgentMessage: Mwapeza {{score}}/{{total}}. Mwayamikirika, mwapasa! Tsopano mungapitirize kundifunsa mafunso ena okhudza mutu uwu.
careerReadiness.heroDescription: Mamodule asanu ndi limodzi akukuthandizira kukonzekera msika wa ntchito — kulemba CV, zakuyankhula, luso la ntchito, ndi zambiri. Yendani mwachangu wanu.

moduleTitles.coverLetterMotivation: Kulemba makalata oyambira ndi mawu olimbikitsa
moduleTitles.workplaceReadiness: Kukonzekera kuyamba ntchito yatsopano: kukonzekera malo a ntchito
moduleTitles.entrepreneurship: Kudzitangira ntchito ndi chitukuko cha bizinesi

home.subtitle: {{appName}} ndi mlatho pakati pa zomwe mwaphunzira ndi komwe mukupita. Lankhulani ndi AI kuti mupeze luso lanu, mukonzekere mafunso antchito, ndikufufuza njira za ntchito ku Zambia.
home.profileStrengthHint: Ndi chiyambi chabwino — yesani Luso ndi Zomwe Ndimakonda kuti mudziwe zambiri za zomwe mukudziwa ndikusangalala nazo.
home.whatToDoSubtitle: Module iliyonse ndi kukambirana kotsogoleredwa ndi AI kapena chinthu chothandiza pa ulendo wanu wa ntchito.

hero.body: Njira yanu yowongolera kuchokera ku luso kupita kuntchito yanu yoyamba. Yambani pozindikira zomwe mumabweretsa - kenako fufuzani ntchito, konzekerani ntchito, ndikupeza mwayi weniweni ku Zambia.
hero.illustrationAlt: Munthu ali pachikwangwani panjira, kuyang'ana njira zantchito

cta.buildProfileDesc: Yambani pozindikira zomwe mumabweretsa, pangani lipoti lathunthu la maluso ndipo tiuzeni mtundu wa ntchito yomwe mukufuna
cta.explorePathsDesc: Fufuzani magawo ndi ntchito zomwe mukukondwera nazo - malipiro, njira za ziyeneretso, mapulogalamu a maphunziro, ndi olemba ntchito akuluakulu.
cta.jobMatchesDesc: Mwayi weniweni ku Zambia yonse, wogwirizana ndi zomwe mungathe kuchita pano.

jobReadySection.title: Konzekerani Ntchito
jobReadySection.description: Mukufuna thandizo posaka ntchito? Yendani m'mamodule awa ndikulimbitsa chidaliro pa CV yanu, mafunso a ntchito, ndi zonse zili pakati.
jobReadySection.empty: Palibe ma module a maphunziro omwe alipo.
jobReadySection.loadError: Sitinathe kutsitsa maphunziro anu. Yesaninso nthawi ina.

myExperience.cardSubtitle: Tsitsani ndi kugawana CV yanu yokonzedwa payekha.

profile.title: Mbiri Yanga
profile.subtitle: Onani ndikuyang'anira zomwe zili mu mbiri yanu
profile.name: Dzina
profile.skillsInterestsProgressDescription: Motali mwafika m'kukambirana kwanu kwa kupeza luso
profile.noSkillsYet: Palibe luso lopezeka mpaka pano. Yambani kukambirana kuti mupeze luso lanu!
profile.noEducationSkillsYet: Palibe luso la maphunziro lopezeka mpaka pano.

energy.title: Mphamvu
energy.description: Kupanga magetsi, solar, kusamalira magalimoto a magetsi

agriculture.title: Ulimi
agriculture.description: Ulimi, kukonza zakudya, bizinesi za ulimi

hospitality.title: Alendo ndi ulendo
hospitality.description: Alendo, ma hotelo, chakudya, ntchito ya makasitomala

modules.skillsDiscoverySubtitle: Chezani ndi {{appName}} kuti mudziwe luso lanu kuchokera kuntchito ndi pa moyo.
modules.skillsDiscoveryDesc: Lankhulani ndi {{appName}} kuti mupeze luso lanu ndi zomwe mumakonda — kuchokera ku maphunziro anu, ntchito, ndi moyo wa tsiku ndi tsiku.
modules.jobReadinessDesc: Phunzirani luso lofunikira la ntchito kudzera mu ma module otsogoleredwa ndi AI — kuyambira kulemba CV mpaka kuchita mafunso oyeserera.
modules.careerExplorerDesc: Fufuzani njira za ntchito mu Mphamvu, Migodi, Ulimi ndi zina — ndi chidziwitso cha malipiro ndi njira zoyenera.
modules.knowledgeHubDesc: Fufuzani mbiri ya magawo, malipiro, ndi njira za maphunziro a TEVET pamalo amodzi.
modules.jobMatchingDesc: Onani momwe luso lanu limafanana ndi maudindo a ntchito enieni ndikufufuza chidziwitso cha msika wa ntchito ku Zambia.

footer.collaboration: {{appName}} ndi chida chaulere cha malangizo a ntchito choperekedwa ndi Unduna wa Ukadaulo ndi Sayansi ku Zambia, chomangidwa mogwirizana ndi World Bank Group ndi Tabiya.

knowledgeHub.heroTitleQuestion: Kodi ku Zambia akulemba ntchito kuti?
knowledgeHub.introduction: Awa ndi magawo ofunikira a Zambia kwa omaliza maphunziro a TEVET. Mbiri iliyonse ikukupatsani chiwonetsero cha momwe makampaniwo akuwonekera, ntchito zomwe zilipo, ndi zomwe mungayembekezere kupeza. Fufuzani magawo omwe amakusangalatsani kuti mupange zisankho zanzeru pa njira yanu ya ntchito.
knowledgeHub.noDocumentsAvailable: Palibe zikalata zomwe zilipo pakadali pano.
knowledgeHub.tevetAccreditedProgrammes: Mapulogalamu ovomerezeka a TEVET ogwirizana ndi gawo la {{sector}}
knowledgeHub.shortCoursesNote: + {{count}} maphunziro achidule operekedwa ndi olemba anzawo ntchito komanso akatswiri ophunzitsa.
knowledgeHub.tableCountAll: Kuwonetsa {{count}} ntchito zonse. Pomwe palibe pulogalamu yomwe yatchulidwa, maphunziro amaperekedwa kuntchito ndi olemba anzawo ntchito kapena maphunziro akutukuka.
knowledgeHub.tableCountFiltered: Kuwonetsa {{count}} ntchito pa ZQF {{level}}. Pomwe palibe pulogalamu yomwe yatchulidwa, maphunziro amaperekedwa kuntchito ndi olemba anzawo ntchito kapena maphunziro akutukuka.
knowledgeHub.newProgrammesDevDesc: Magawo ofunikira kwambiri a maphunziro omwe adadziwika kudzera mu ILO/TEVETA Skills Development for Increased Employability Programme (SDEP) ndi zokambirana zamagulu.
knowledgeHub.devOccupationsLabel: Ntchito zopanda mapulogalamu odzipereka a TEVET

jobMatching.pageDescription: Onani mwayi wa ntchito zenizeni ndikuona momwe luso lanu likugwirizana ndi mwayi uzambezi.

matched.programmeBanner: Pezani zofanana zokonzedwa mwamakonda ambiri pomaliza kucheza kwa Pangani mbiri yanu.
matched.emptyNoSkills: Ntchito zofanana sizinapezeke pano. Malizani gawo la "Pangani mbiri yanu" kuti mutsegule malingaliro opangidwa mwamakonda.
matched.emptyProgrammeNoMatches: Palibe zofanana pano. Malizani kucheza kwa Pangani mbiri yanu kuti mupeze ntchito zogwirizana ndi maluso anu.
matched.emptySiNoMatches: Pakali pano tilibe zofanana kwa inu — bwerani mudzayang'anenso mtsogolo.

faq.lede: Mayankho ku mafunso wamba okhudza Njila — momwe imagwirira ntchito, momwe mungalembetsere, ndi momwe mungathetsere mavuto wamba.
faq.noResults: Palibe mafunso amene akugwirizana ndi kufufuza kumeneko.
